title: aulax umbellata
intro: Aulax umbellata, also known as African teaberry or wild teaberry, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Aulax umbellata are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of Aulax umbellata include infusions, teas, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, diarrhea, and skin infections.
